title: Bengal Polls Heat Up: Mamata Threatens Legal Action Over Amit Shah’s ‘Hang Upside Down’ Remark, HM Retorts ‘She Keeps Losing In Courts’
description: Amid West Bengal polls, Mamata Banerjee threatened legal action against Amit Shah over his ‘hang upside down’ remark, while the Union Home Minister retorted that she ‘keeps losing in courts’.
